subject: [MODELING]Configure environment variables in configmap
commit_message:
[MODELING]Configure environment variables in configmap

Environment variables should be configured through configmap

Issue-ID: MODELING-391

Signed-off-by: dengyh <dengyuanhong@chinamobile.com>

Patch Set 2:

I let Krzysztof take a look on this one!

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-2

This patch does not change anything in terms how environment variables are processed inside the container.

The motivation behind the requirement that you are trying to cover is to make sure that the actual config files that are used by your application are provided as configmaps not just the values.

Just to be clear: technically I'm not against this patch I'm happy to merge it but I wanted to make sure that you realize that it's not enough to cover this requirement
